log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Changeling — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Changeling — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Changeling — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Changeling — Bardic Musician HP: 45/67
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 32 damage. Changeling — Bardic Musician HP: 13/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Changeling — Bardic Musician --- HP: 13/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (13/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Changeling — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Changeling — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Changeling — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Changeling — Bardic Musician HP: -7/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
